description_long: This hammer features a robust, metallic construction with a symmetrical, double-sided head that is adorned with angular, geometric details and a central circular element. The head is capped with a pointed spike on top and has textured, studded surfaces on each end, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty impact. The handle is straight and segmented, with spherical and cylindrical sections that provide both structural reinforcement and a unique visual style. The metallic finish is dark and slightly weathered, giving the hammer an industrial, almost steampunk appearance. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, with a focus on durability and striking power. No visible branding or accessories are present, and the hammer appears to be in excellent condition.
description: A heavy, double-sided metallic hammer with a spiked, geometric head and a segmented, reinforced handle. The design is industrial and robust, with dark, weathered metal surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical, double-sided head with a central circular detail and a pointed spike on top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cylindrical depth of the hammer head and the full length of the straight, segmented handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, highlighting the geometric head and central spike, but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the studded texture and the layered construction of the hammer head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, segmented metal handle with spherical and cylindrical reinforcements, likely steel, with a rough, industrial finish.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided, geometric sledge-type head with a central circular detail and a pointed spike on top; both ends are studded and angular for heavy impact.
